creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 205800
patch to port

Here's a patch which adds an option to enable the pcre support in less, cleans up the port to match portlint, improves formatting and enables the color and pcre options by default.

If you don't want to enable the options by default, that's fine, I enabled them by default because thought if a user is using less from ports then they were probably looking for features that they wouldn't get from the base version, so we may as well enable them by default.
